debug_info.goal:
k : ℕ
⊢ Fintype.card ↑(ch04.U k) = Fintype.card ↑(ch04.T k)

failed_attempts:
have h_prime : (4 * k + 1).Prime := (inferInstance : Fact (4 * k + 1).Prime).out
  have h_ne_zero : ∀ s : S k, (s.1.1 - s.1.2.1) + s.1.2.2 ≠ 0 := by
    intro s
    rcases s with ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩
    simp only [S, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hS
    intro h_eq
    have : z = y - x := eq_sub_of_add_eq h_eq
    rw [this] at hS
    have : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by linear_combination hS
    have : (x + y).natAbs ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by
      norm_cast at this
      rw [sq_abs]
      exact this
    have h_sqrt : (x + y).natAbs = 1 ∨ (x + y).natAbs = 4 * k + 1 :=
      h_prime.eq_one_or_self_of_dvd _ ⟨_, this⟩
    rcases h_sqrt with h1 | h2
    · rw [h1] at this; simp at this; linarith
    · rw [h2] at this;
      have : 4 * k + 1 = 1 := by
        nth_rewrite 1 [← pow_one (4 * k + 1)] at this
        exact Nat.pow_right_injective h_prime.two_le this
      simp at this; linarith
  let σ := linearInvo k
  have h_bij : ∀ (A : Set (S k)), (∀ s ∈ A, σ s ∉ A) → (∀ s ∉ A, σ s ∈ A) → 2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    intro A h1 h2
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_compl, two_mul]
    congr 1
    apply Fintype.card_congr
    refine ⟨fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, h1 s hs⟩, fun ⟨s, hs⟩ ↦ ⟨σ s, h2 s hs⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    all_goals { intro; simp [linearInvo_sq] }
  have hT : 2 * Fintype.card (T k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    apply h_bij
    · intro s hs; simp [T] at hs ⊢; rcases s with ⟨⟨x,y,z⟩,h⟩; simp [linearInvo]; linarith
    · intro s hs; simp [T] at hs ⊢; rcases s with ⟨⟨x,y,z⟩,h⟩; simp [linearInvo]
      have : z ≠ 0 := by
        intro hz; simp [hz] at h; have := (Int.emod_eq_emod_iff_emod_sub_eq_zero 4).mp (congr_arg (· % 4) h)
        norm_num at this
      linarith
  have hU : 2 * Fintype.card (U k) = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    apply h_bij
    · intro s hs; simp [U] at hs ⊢; have := h_ne_zero s
      rcases s with ⟨⟨x,y,z⟩,h⟩; simp [linearInvo]; linarith
    · intro s hs; simp [U] at hs ⊢; have := h_ne_zero (σ s)
      rcases s with ⟨⟨x,y,z⟩,h⟩; simp [linearInvo] at *; linarith
  linarith
